name: macfan
title: MacFan
description: Control MacFan fan speeds from Raycast.
author: shaoyuhuang

commands.name: control-fans
commands.title: Control Fans
commands.description: View fan speeds and set Auto, Max, or a custom RPM.

commands.name: auto-fan
commands.title: Auto Fan
commands.description: Return all fans to automatic control.

commands.name: max-fan
commands.title: Max Fan
commands.description: Set every fan to its firmware-reported maximum RPM.

preferences.name: helperPath
preferences.title: macfanctl Helper Path
preferences.description: Path to the installed privileged macfanctl helper.
